---
title: 'First the Blade...teaching the kids'
date: '2012-02-19T20:56:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7383904886975051852'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/first-bladeteaching-kids.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Answers'
---

<br />
<div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;">
02/17/2012<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />The Kids and I said “Money Cometh” on Friday morning… and I got a $1 bill in Cayman Islands Monetary Authority and $20 Peso bill&nbsp; and two coins.</div>
<div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;">
<br /></div>
<div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;">
That makes me wonder...&nbsp;What else am I saying?</div>
<div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;">
<br /></div>
<div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;">
The seed of your future is planted by your mouth, the present is the result of the seed you've already sown.<br />
<br />
02/12/2012<br />
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman';">This morning after church the kids saw how cold it was, and the clouds.&nbsp;</span><br />
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br /></span><br />
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman';">They asked, "When is it going to snow?" for the unknownth time since it started getting cold in November.&nbsp;</span><br />
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br /></span><br />
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman';">I said, "Let's command it to snow", so we all said "Sky, SNOW in Jesus Name!"&nbsp;</span><br />
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br /></span><br />
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman';">And just before bed time, snow is now falling form the sky.&nbsp;</span><br />
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br /></span><br />
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Those are the moments when life is sweet. God's Word is true!</span>
</div>
